steps.title: Use the triangle angle sum
steps.content: The figure shows a right triangle with one angle of $24^{\circ}$ and another angle labeled $a$. The three interior angles of a triangle sum to $180^{\circ}$.

steps.title: Identify the triangle angle-sum relationship
steps.content:
The triangle has a right angle ($90^{\circ}$), an angle of $24^{\circ}$, and the unknown angle $a$. The three interior angles of any triangle sum to $180^{\circ}$:
$$90^{\circ} + 24^{\circ} + a = 180^{\circ}$$
